title: Greek Indulgent Lamb Kebabs
description: Crisp and garlicky greek lamb kebabs made with tender lamb loin chops. Served best with a side of warm pita bread and tzatziki sauce.
instructions: Thread lamb loin chops onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix minced garlic with chopped parsley and dill.
Brush lamb with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill lamb for 4-6 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Let lamb rest for 5 minutes before slicing into slices.
Squeeze lemon zest over lamb and serve warm pita bread on the side with tzatziki sauce.
Mix Greek yogurt, lemon zest, and garlic in a bowl.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed to make tzatziki sauce.
Chill tzatziki sauce in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Just before serving, mix in chopped parsley and dill to the tzatziki sauce.
Serve tzatziki sauce chilled and warm pita bread on the side with lamb kebabs.
